title: Submit Pass

submInfo.levelId: Search for a level or input ID

videoInfo.title: Title
videoInfo.nolink: Enter a valid YouTube video link

holdTooltip: Check this if a different hold tile behavior was used (no holding required etc.)
keyCountTooltip: Number of keys used for this pass.
feelingTooltip: How hard it felt for you personally. Valid examples: G1-G5, 17~18+, U1, etc.
expectedTooltip: What difficulty the level should be rated as (optional). Same format as feeling rating.
adofaiV2Tooltip: Check this if the clear was recorded on ADOFAI v2

alert.login: Please log in to submit a pass
alert.form: Please fill in all required fields correctly

warnings.pendingProfiles: This profile will be requested for creation:

rules.checkbox: I've read and confirm that I have followed the

tilecountMismatch.title: Judgement total does not match level tilecount
tilecountMismatch.body: This level's chart has {{tilecount}} tiles. Your total judgements add up to {{hitSum}}. These values might be wrong.
